_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: Down 2-0, the Spurs face a desperate must-win at Madison Square Garden to avoid a devastating hole in the NBA Finals. New York looks to put a stranglehold on the series tonight, turning the pressure up on San Antonio to prove they can survive the hostile environment.

The Mariners look to claw back into the AL West race as they open a high-stakes series against an Orioles squad desperate to reclaim the top spot in the American League. With playoff positioning tightening, tonight’s clash serves as a critical litmus test for two teams fighting to prove their October legitimacy.

The Red Sox roll into St. Pete desperate to salvage their fading postseason aspirations against a Rays squad looking to play spoiler. With the Wild Card gap widening, Boston needs a statement series win to prove they aren't ready to fold just yet.

The Yankees and Guardians collide in a high-stakes clash of AL heavyweights, with both clubs looking to assert divisional dominance and secure a critical tie-breaker edge. Expect a postseason-caliber atmosphere as these two pennant contenders battle for control of the American League standings.

The Phillies roll into Toronto looking to tighten their grip on the NL East, while the Blue Jays fight to salvage pride in a season defined by missed opportunities. With Philadelphia chasing a top seed and Toronto playing spoiler, every pitch carries the weight of contrasting postseason realities.

The Astros look to tighten their grip on the AL West as they open a critical series against an Angels squad desperate to play spoiler. With Houston’s postseason positioning on the line, every pitch in Anaheim carries massive weight in the division race.

The Reds head to Petco Park looking to salvage momentum, but they face a Padres squad desperate to tighten their grip on a crowded National League Wild Card race. With every game carrying postseason weight, San Diego’s high-octane offense must overcome Cincinnati’s unpredictable arms to keep their October aspirations firmly in control.

The Nationals look to play spoiler in the Bay as the Giants desperately cling to the fringes of the Wild Card race. With San Francisco’s postseason window narrowing by the day, every pitch tonight is a must-win against a Washington squad playing with nothing to lose.

The Brewers look to tighten their grip on the NL Central as they open a series against an Athletics squad desperate to play spoiler in the final stretch. With Milwaukee’s postseason cushion thinning, every win against a sub-.500 opponent is a non-negotiable requirement.
